primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive coverage of renal replacement therapy modalities and kidney transplantation

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines and Clinical Practice Recommendations for Vascular Access
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative guidance on arteriovenous fistulas, grafts, and vascular access procedures

primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline on Acute Kidney Injury
primary_sources.relevance: Defines continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT) modalities and acute dialysis procedures

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines for Peritoneal Dialysis Adequacy
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive terminology and procedures for peritoneal dialysis modalities

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases - Dialysis Terminology Review
secondary_sources.relevance: Peer-reviewed definitions and standardized terminology for dialysis procedures

gaps: Limited recent updates to peritoneal dialysis terminology guidelines
Need for standardized CRRT procedure definitions across guidelines
